query:
SELECT tm.id as teamMemberId, tm.name, tm.email, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calls c WHERE c.teamMemberId = tm.id AND c.status = 'completed') as graded_calls,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_badges ub WHERE ub.teamMemberId = tm.id) as badge_count
FROM team_members tm 
WHERE tm.name LIKE '%Kyle%' OR tm.email LIKE '%kyle%'
LIMIT 5;
